scenario: Generate CHANGELOG from git log with REQ mappings

commits.message: fix: handle edge case in punctuation

expected_behavior: Create CHANGELOG.md header, prepend ## [v1.0.0] - YYYY-MM-DD with Added/Fixed sections linked to REQ-N, commit with message 'docs: add CHANGELOG entry for v1.0.0', proceed to /s7-telemetry
notes: No existing CHANGELOG - create with header and current version block

scenario: CHANGELOG update with breaking changes and migration guide
expected_behavior: Prepend ## [v2.0.0] section to existing CHANGELOG.md, include Breaking Changes block with migration steps, commit, proceed to /s7-telemetry
notes: Migration guide required when breaking changes present

expected_behavior: Prepend ## [v1.6.0] section with Note: 'This release was validated via dry-run. No live deployment was performed.', commit, proceed to /s7-telemetry
notes: Dry-run note added to distinguish from live releases

scenario: CHANGELOG without deploy log triggers BLOCKED
expected_behavior: BLOCKED: deploy log missing. Cannot write release notes for an undeployed version.
notes: Hard-gate violation - deploy log required before CHANGELOG update

scenario: Prepend to existing CHANGELOG with Unreleased section
expected_behavior: Insert ## [v0.2.0] block after ## [Unreleased] line, commit, maintain existing version history intact
notes: Respects existing structure and Unreleased placeholder
